tags_to_add.description: New broader tags to create and add

name.description: Name of the tag to add

parent_name.description: Name of parent tag, or empty string for top-level categories

tags.description: Tags to apply to this text

name.description: Name of the tag to apply

parent_name.description: Name of parent tag, or empty string for top-level categories

merges.description: List of tag pairs to merge

loser_name.description: Name of the tag to merge into the winner and delete

reason.description: Brief explanation for why these tags should be merged

winner_name.description: Name of the tag that should survive (canonical name)

citations_used.description: List of citation numbers referenced across the operations.

operations.description: List of section operations to apply to the article, in order. Return a single operation with op="NoChange" if nothing needs to change.

after_heading.description: For InsertSection only: exact existing heading to insert AFTER, or empty string to append at end of article. For all other ops: empty string.

content.description: New markdown content for the operation. Only NoChange may use empty content. AppendToSection, ReplaceSection, and InsertSection must provide non-empty markdown content with citations.

heading.description: For AppendToSection/ReplaceSection: exact existing heading to target. For InsertSection: the new section's heading. For NoChange: empty string.
